name: iptv-spider
description: IPTV爬虫项目，用于自动抓取、管理和优化IPTV直播源

scripts.build: echo '=== 开始构建 IPTV Spider ===' && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install wheel && python -m pip install lxml --only-binary=lxml && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '=== 构建完成 ==='

author: IPTV Spider Team
